feed.title: SAP Community - HCM (Human Capital Management)
feed.subtitle: HCM (Human Capital Management) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Configuration for manual Absence Days in IT2001
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

May I know how to change the "Absence Days" in IT2001 from system automatically calculation to manually input?

For example, within the Start Date to End Date 01.01.2024 to 31.01.2024, the absence days was 10.

My rationale behind is to make the input as simple as possible, no need to set employee's factory own calendar, checking on Saturdays, Sundays, Public Holidays or working days.

My company is using HCM in ECC 6.0, not SuccessFactor in S4HANA.

Thanks & regards,

James

entry.title: Can an individual have both an N ID and an NY ID at the same time?
entry.content: We have a case where some employees are moving from a mandated MR business to a non-mandated MR business.  For those totally migrated to the non-mandated business, they will have NY IDs.  For those that will be supporting both for a while it was recommended that they have both an N ID and an NY ID.  Is there a process defined on how to create the second ID?  SInce they currently have an N ID, we would be creating an NY ID to be used simultaneously with the N ID.

entry.title: HUMAN CAPITAL MANAGEMENT
entry.content:
Hello everybody, my name is Agostina, I am from Italy.  

I have worked with SAP as a Personnel Administrator for 8 years but I am a little lost on how to certificate my knowledge and also to improve it.

I have complete the "Getting started with SAP HCM and HCM Payroll" course, but I am not sure about how to continue.

My specific interest is more in Personnel Administration, can you give me a clue?

Wich are the certifications most important? 

Thank you all in advance!

Agostina

entry.title: Restrict concurrent employment from SuccessFactors replication
entry.content:
Hi All

We need the concurrent employment function in SF but upon replicating the employee to HCM system using program: ECPAO_EE_ORG_REPL_QUERY, we need only the primary employment and the secondary employment should not be replicated.

Currently, when replicating the employee (who has both primary and secondary employment created in SF) to HCM system, we are getting below error “Pernr XXXXXX can't be used as it is already assigned to a different Userid XXXXX”.

Could not get any BAdI to restrict the secondary employment. Appreciate your suggestions.

 

Regards

Vinoth

entry.title: Configuration of Infotype 0105 in PA70 for Fast Entry. HELP
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I am attempting to add Infotype 0105 to the PA70 transaction for fast entry purposes. Here are the steps I have followed so far:

  1. Navigated to SPRO => IMG => Personnel Management => Personnel Administration => Infotype Menus.
  2. Accessed the Infotype Menus section and reviewed the User Group Dependency on Menus and Info Groups for 07 = Fast Entry of Master Data.
  3. I then selected the Infotype Menu, where I confirmed that menu number 07 is present.
  4. I created a new entry in the relevant table with the following details:
    • User Group: 99
    • Menu No.: 07
    • Infotype: 0105
    • Screen Control: (left blank)

While I can see Infotype 0105 in PA70, I encountered an error stating, "No entry in the table T558Q for Infotype 0105."

Could anyone provide detailed guidance on how to successfully configure and implement Infotype 0105 in PA70? Additionally, please advise whether ABAP expertise is required for this task.

Thank you for your assistance!

entry.title: ECP LDB PNP get pernr returning all records irrespective of data selection period
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have created a Z program where i am using LBD PNP to get the data for employees in my ECP system. How ever I notice that when i am using GET PERNR it is fetcing all the data irrespective of the data selection period. E.g. I am having 3 records in my IT0000 and in the report when i am passing current date in the data selection period then also it is fetching 3 records instead of fetching the valid record. Can you please let me know why this is happening in ECP. Is there any config change that needs to be done.

Thanks,

Salish

entry.title: Is there any possibility to have report of position relationship infotype of PP01 in HCM?
Query about HR loans (infotype 45)
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know if it is possible to suspend a loa (infotype 45) for a period of time without having to pay it off and create a new one with the remaining amount.

entry.title: Payroll Third-Party Remittance(3PR) Evaluation Run in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

In the last month, we converted to S/4 HANA. We have a problem with Payroll Third party remittance processing.

In ECC, we were able to run 3PR evaluation run using PC00_M07_K500 when control record is in "EXIT" status and SAP recommends that it should be in EXIT status, whereas in S/4 it should be in "Release for payroll" status. We have a problem with this prerequisite in S/4. 

SAP recommends that Transfer to FI/CO, and Direct Deposit/Data Medium Exchange programs are run prior to beginning 3PR process. So, to run FI/CO posting, the control record should be in EXIT status, again to run 3PR after this, Evaluation program is expecting the control record to be in "Release for payroll" status, which is confusing.

We thought we can use "Ignore payroll control record" option on the payroll driver program, but this option works only in the Test systems based on the setting in table T000. It is not working in Production.

We are in second payroll run in S/4 now and this issue is impacting our 3PR processing in Production. In the last payroll run, we manually adjusted the control record to allow it to work. We need immediate feedback on this as we have an upcoming payroll run next Monday Nov 11th. Please suggest if we have any solution to this problem or advise if we are missing any step in S/4.

Thank you.

entry.title: 9/80 Work Schedule
entry.content: How are other companies practicing the 9/80 work schedule when it comes to taking time off in SAP?

entry.title: Quota Type Inconsistences in automatic accrued quota.
entry.content:
Hie Gurus

We recently implemented a currency conversion project and it involved copying of the old client and begin transacting in a new client. For my module we copied data tables from the old system as the copying of clients only took configurations only. The client was using Personnel Admin and Time Management only.PA worked out perfectly 

However with Time Management we copied the Absences tables ,including table PTQUODED that keeps Time Quota Overview. The old client had a Earliest Retroactive Accounting Date of 31.05.2016 which was also carried to the new client. Quota Balances were also carried into the new client perfectly.

The problem arose when the user ran their Time Evaluation as they usually do at the end of every month resulting in the leave balances of the quota that automatically accrue being wrong. Some balances went as far as ending up in the negative.

I tried correcting the balances using the Time Quota Correction infotype but each time ,time evaluation was ran the balances got distorted again. I also tried running the repots RPTKOK00 and RPTBPC10 to no avail .Actually it has also resulted in some employees accrual entitlement history being erased and starting in January of 2023 instead of May 2016.

Please kindly assist did i miss something on the copying of tables or something.

entry.title: Date getting stuck in story reports data queries
entry.content:
Hi 

Quite often the dynamic date of 'today' in my story report gets stuck and doesn't refresh every day as expected. 

When I investigate the data query, I confirm that all data tables are filtered to the time setting of - dynamic date - as of today. It is not obvious to me what could cause the date to be getting stuck. 

To fix the issue, I take the filter off and reapply and then the data refreshes to show what I would expect to see. 

This date issue is affecting all story reports but not consistently. Example, one report with dynamic date as today will get stuck but a similar report on the same day will be fine. The reports are all structured in a similar way with most of them beginning with 'Job Information'. 

Please can I get advise on how I can ensure my story reports with dynamic dates do not get stuck ? 

Thanks 
Aisling

entry.title: S4 Employee BP Integration: Adding Employment Role to existing Business Partner with Vendor Role
entry.content:
Hey there, we are within a brown field conversion and implemented the New Data Model for employees. 

The employee BP is in NR HR0XXXXXX external (PERNR integrated), the employment BP war planend for number range 99 99000000. This is the grouping for the travel vendors. Those were synced to BPs (same number before the conversion)

Now the problem: if we run the sync report it generates a new BP 99... but there is already one with the PERNR in LFB1. In my opinion this link is perfect for matching them? In VMODE1 we did not have a problem. 

What can we do???

entry.title: MCQ Cnnfirmation
entry.content:
I am currently undergoing training in the course "Getting Started with SAP HCM and HCM Payroll." After completing the quiz for Chapter 3, I found that my answer was marked incorrect. I selected **Option B**, Where Mcqs Was:

 
Q2.What is meant by the integration of Personnel Administration and Organizational Management?
A: The cost center relationship is inherited from Organizational Management if Controlling is integrated
B: Every detail of the organizational structure can be used as default values in Personnel Administration
 
I later asked this question to three different AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini, and Poe), and they all provided the same answer, confirming that Option B was correct. Please Guide me in this Error.

entry.title: Is it possible to send email to business and private emails of employees?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Business request: to send an email that is triggered after the termination of an employee (via workflow)  to both their business (primary) and private email. Is it possible to achieve this?

Thanks a lot,

Anna

entry.title: Org Replication From EC to S4 have different structures
entry.content:
Dear Members ,

I have a scenario where the Org replication structure in EC is different from S4/ HANA . We are replicating data from EC to S4/HANA . We have  multiple managers assigned to multiple users in EC . we also have mass positions which needs to be mapped in S4/HANA . All these mass positions have been kept in one position in EC in a  dummy position at a level higher . We also have different relationship matrix for these managers . Example employee 1 reports to dummy1 but has relationship mentor1 , Mentor 2 etc. These Mentor 1 , Mentor 2 positions are holder of different managers .

 

I have worked with basic set up of BIB or Org replication your guidance would be highly appreciated . How do we manage situations like this when the structure of EC is different than the structure of S4/hana and how do we create the right relationships in S4/HANA .  Can this be handled in mapping ? BADI ? or some where in staging area ?

entry.title: Ajuste mensual de ISR Mexico
entry.content:
Saludos,

Tengo el caso siguiente donde se ejecuta en la ultima nomina del mes (quincenal o semanal) con ajuste de ISR a fin de mes.  En este proceso la base gravada del mes no esta incluyendo el monto gravado de nominas especiales ejecutadas.

Hay alguna configuracion que permita sumar este gravado extraordinario o se debe hacer uso de algun exit.

Gracias

Liseth Linarez

entry.title: SAP HCM for SAP Cloud Private Edition
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have spent many days exploring documentation on RISE with SAP and the conversion guides for transitioning for SAP ERP to SAP Hana Cloud Private Edition. Globally I do have an overview of how this is working and what are the steps to be taken for the conversion process. 

The scenario I do not understand regarding the conversion process is when SAP ERP system is used for different modules like FI, CO, SD, MM and also HCM within the same client and the business need is to only migrate HCM to SAP Cloud Private Edition  and keep the rest of the modules (FI, SD, MM ) as they are on the SAP ERP system. Is it possible to only migrate HCM to SAP Cloud Private Edition or the whole SAP ERP system should be converted including all modules?  during the conversion process is there any step where only specific modules and application can be selected for the conversion?

Many thanks

Rachid.

entry.title: A Deep Dive into Role-Based Permissions: Best Practices for Access Management
entry.content:
What are Role-based Permissions?

Role-based permissions are a security model in SAP SuccessFactors that allows you to grant or restrict the system access to any user.

It helps organizations ensure that the right people are getting the right permissions in the system.

Role based permissions has three main elements called:-

  • Permission Groups
  • Permission Roles
  • Target Population
  1. Permission Groups – Group of Employees

Permission groups are the user or user’s who share similar permissions or certain attributes.

  1. Permission Roles – Set of permissions

Permission roles are set of permissions a user can access or do in the system.

  1. Target Population – Target population are employees for whom behalf the action has been performed. It is denoted by t.

Note:- All permissions doesn’t required the target population, only some permissions requires that and it’s denoted by t at the end of the permission.

 

You can identify the permission groups, roles and target population by finding out who, What and whom in your requirements. Where Who represents the permission groups, what represents the permission roles and whom respresents the target population.

 

To simplify the steps, you can divide it into below steps:-

  1. Permission Groups
  2. Permission Roles
  3. Granted Population
  4. Targeted Population
  5. Assign permissions to the Granted Population
  6. Define who are the targeted Population

Process to implement the RBP is as below:-

Permission Groups -> Permission Roles -> Granting Permission Roles to Permission Groups - > Target Population

Let’s try to understand the role-based permissions with example. Suppose a customer wants that only HR managers can create/update or delete the objectives/goals for employees in US.

 

Here HR manager in USA will be our Granted population.

Create/Update or delete the goals and other permissions are permission roles.

All employees who work in USA are the targeted population.

 

Procedure to Implement RBP

Pre-requisites-

You must have access to role based permission.

 

  1. Permission Groups

To create Permission Groups, User must have relevant Permission.

In Demo Environment, I logged in as Aanya Singh(sfadmin){Superadmin for the system}

Procedure:-

In Homepage, under search for actions or people search for Manage Permission Groups -> Create New - > Give a unique name -> Select the employees you want to Grouped -> Done.

 

Give a Name to your Group Name-> Select the employee whom you want to give permission.

In below example:-  We have grouped Human resource employees who are working in US and excluded the employees who job level is Executive Support.

Group Name :: Granted_User_Sugandha

User Type :: Employee

 

 

Result:-

Now we have successfully created the group Granted_user_Sugandha under permission groups, you can see we have 23 Active memberships.

 

 

  1. Permission Roles

To create Permission Groups, User must have relevant Permission.

In Demo Environment, I logged in as Aanya Singh(sfadmin){Superadmin for the system}

Procedure:-

Go to Manage Permission Roles -> Create - > Basic information -> Add Permission -> Done.

 

Img 2.1                                                                              Img 2.1

 

The next step is to fill in Basic information in Create Role such as Name and description(optional). In the example below, we have named Human Resource_US (Sugandha_Test) -> Click Next.

                                                                           Img2.2

Add Permissions, Give the required permission you want to give to the user. We have  User Permission and Administrative Permission.

After adding the required permission, save it.

 

  1. Granting Permission Roles to Groups

Go to Permission roles -> Under Human Resource_US_Test -> Add Role Assignment -> Basic Information - > 

 

 Whom you want to give access, to all employees or from Groups, If Group than Which group you want to give access, select the group & if you want to add their direct managers you can do and Save.

 

  1. Target Population

Note- We have given additional permission in the roles for human resource_US as shown in below image, Under User permissions, Object plan permission need a Target Population (Denoted by t symbol), Where we need to add Target population. In below example Human resource_US can create a goal for employees in US., our target population is employees in USA.

entry.title: 401k/Roth combined employer match issue
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We have an issue when we match a  combined contribution of a 401(k) and a Roth plan

401(k) and Roth = 100% match on the first 3% and then 50% match on the next 3% which equates to a MAX of 4.50% employer match.

Scenario:

Employee elects the two at:

3% 401(k) = 3% Employer Match

3% Roth = 3% Employer Match

SAP calculates a total of 6% employer match which exceeds the 4.50% employer match.

Has anyone else experienced this and if so, what have you done to resolve this?
